summary: Frontend testing for product image upload refactoring - All critical checks PASSED. Products page loads, Add Product modal opens with 'Tap to upload image' placeholder visible. Brands page also works correctly (regression check passed). The image picker cannot be fully tested in automation (requires OS-level file dialog) but all UI elements are working.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review PASSED: pickImage function in products.tsx (line 113-125) correctly uses base64:true and stores data:image/jpeg;base64,... in state
Code review PASSED: Image preview in modal (line 346-355) uses formData.image directly without startsWith('/') check
Code review PASSED: Matches the working brands.tsx implementation pattern exactly
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing products and brands were used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product image upload was refactored to use base64 inline approach matching brands. Key points: 1) pickImage uses base64:true config. 2) Image stored as data:image/jpeg;base64,... in formData.image state. 3) No more upload endpoint flow. Actual file picker dialog cannot be tested via Playwright (OS-level). The + button click coordinates for admin pages: use position around (1890, 28) on brands page.
